OVERVIEW: Shuts down a running virtual machine.

USAGE: utmctl stop [--debug] [--hide] <identifier> [--force] [--kill] [--request]

ARGUMENTS:
  <identifier>            Either the UUID or the complete name of the virtual
                          machine.

OPTIONS:
  -d, --debug             Show debug logging.
  --hide                  Hide the main UTM window.
  --force                 Force stop by sending a power off event (default)
  --kill                  Force kill the VM process
  --request               Request power down from guest operating system
  -h, --help              Show help information.
